overview: I built a multi-agent adversarial workflow to pressure-test marketing claims. Evidence agents gather supporting data in parallel, then Opus-powered adversary and Haiku defender loop until a convergence guard exits. Every test claim returned Not Substantiated — correctly.

keyPoints.title: 12 evidence agents, 3 selected per claim type
Adversarial loop: Opus attacks, Haiku rebuts each round
~360k tokens, ~$4.38 per run at API rates
Hygiene checks passed; adversary still caught fake evidence
Convergence guard exits only when no new critical attacks emerge
